seoTitle: Evora vs Fairdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evora and Fairdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evora and Fairdale.
heading: Evora vs Fairdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evora, Queensland and Fairdale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evora and Fairdale have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Evora or Fairdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evora has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Fairdale scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evora scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Fairdale scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evora or Fairdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
